title: Wordfeud

finder.blankHint: Use * for blank tiles (0 points). Max 7 letters.
finder.hint: Enter your tiles and search to find playable words.

board.title: Board Editor
board.hint: Click a cell and type to place a letter. Arrow keys to navigate, Delete to clear, Space to toggle blank.

selectGameHint: Select a game from the dropdown to view the board.
notConnected: No Wordfeud account connected. Connect your account in Settings to load your games.
notConnectedNonAdmin: No Wordfeud account connected. Ask an admin to connect a Wordfeud account in Settings.
